Pharmaceutial

Pharmaceutical Notebook

  • Regulatory

  • SDTM
  • Other

Compound

Drug Compound Company Indication
Opdivo Nivolumab BMS Cancer treatment, including Melanoma, lung cancer, and more.
Eliquis Apixaban BMS, Pfizer Prevent blood clots, stroke in atrial fibrillation, deep vein thrombosis.
Reblozyl Luspatercept BMS, Acceleron Pharma Treat anemia in adults with beta thalassemia or myelodysplastic syndromes.
Revlimid Lenalidomide BMS Multiple myeloma, myelodysplastic syndromes, mantle cell lymphoma.
Yervoy Ipilimumab BMS Melanoma, renal cell carcinoma, metastatic colorectal cancer.
Comirnaty BNT162b2 (mRNA-based vaccine) Pfizer, BioNTech COVID-19 vaccination.
Prevnar Pneumococcal vaccine Pfizer Pneumococcal infections prevention.
Ibrance Palbociclib Pfizer Breast cancer treatment.
Xeljanz Tofacitinib Pfizer Rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and ulcerative colitis treatment.
Keytruda Pembrolizumab Merck & Co. Various types of cancer, including Melanoma and lung cancer.
Januvia Sitagliptin Merck & Co. Type 2 diabetes.
Gardasil Human Papillomavirus Vaccine Merck & Co. Prevention of HPV-related diseases, including cervical cancer.
Lynparza Olaparib AstraZeneca, Merck & Co. Treatment of ovarian, breast, prostate, and pancreatic cancers.
Pneumovax Pneumococcal Polysaccharide Vaccine Merck & Co. Prevention of pneumococcal infections.
Humira Adalimumab AbbVie Treats autoimmune diseases like rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and Crohn`s disease.
Skyrizi Risankizumab AbbVie Treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis.
Rinvoq Upadacitinib AbbVie Rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and ankylosing spondylitis.
Imbruvica Ibrutinib Pharmacyclics(AbbVie), J& J Treats certain types of cancer, such as mantle cell lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia.
Venclexta Venetoclax AbbVie, Roche Used in the treatment of chronic lymphocytic leukemia and small lymphocytic lymphoma.
Stelara Ustekinumab J& J Treats plaque psoriasis, Crohn’s disease, and ulcerative colitis.
Remicade Infliximab J& J Used for Crohn’s disease, ulcerative colitis, rheumatoid arthritis, and other autoimmune diseases.
Darzalex Daratumumab J& J Treats multiple myeloma.
Xarelto Rivaroxaban Bayer, J& J Prevents blood clots in people with atrial fibrillation, deep vein thrombosis, and pulmonary embolism.
Yescarta Axicabtagene Ciloleucel Kite Pharma (a Gilead Company) Treats certain types of large B-cell lymphoma, including those that are refractory or have relapsed after at least two other kinds of treatment.
Ocrevus Ocrelizumab Roche Treats multiple sclerosis.
Avastin Bevacizumab Roche Used for various types of cancers including colorectal, lung, and kidney cancer.
Herceptin Trastuzumab Roche Treats HER2-positive breast cancer and stomach cancer.
Rituxan Rituximab Roche Treats non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma, chronic lymphocytic leukemia and rheumatoid arthritis.
Hemlibra Emicizumab Roche Prevents bleeding in people with hemophilia A.
Cosentyx Secukinumab Novartis Used to treat plaque psoriasis, ankylosing spondylitis, and psoriatic arthritis.
Entresto Sacubitril/Valsartan Novartis Used for treating heart failure.
Gilenya Fingolimod Novartis Treats multiple sclerosis.
Lucentis Ranibizumab Novartis Used for age-related macular degeneration and other eye conditions.
Zolgensma Onasemnogene abeparvovec Novartis Gene therapy for spinal muscular atrophy.
Dupixent Dupilumab Sanofi, Regeneron Treats eczema, asthma, and chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyposis.
Lantus Insulin glargine Sanofi Long-acting insulin used for diabetes mellitus.
Aubagio Teriflunomide Sanofi Treats relapsing forms of multiple sclerosis.
Toujeo Insulin glargine Sanofi Long-acting insulin for managing blood sugar levels in diabetes.
Praluent Alirocumab Sanofi, Regeneron Used in lowering LDL cholesterol.
Shingrix Recombinant Zoster Vaccine GSK Prevents shingles (herpes zoster) in adults.
Trelegy Fluticasone furoate/Umeclidinium/Vilanterol GSK Used for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
Nucala Mepolizumab GSK Treats severe eosinophilic asthma and EGPA.
Zejula Niraparib GSK Used for ovarian, fallopian tube, or peritoneal cancer.
Benlysta Belimumab GSK Treats systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE).
Tagrisso Osimertinib AstraZeneca Treats non-small cell lung cancer with specific mutations.
Imfinzi Durvalumab AstraZeneca Used for urothelial carcinoma and non-small cell lung cancer.
Farxiga Dapagliflozin AstraZeneca Treats Type 2 diabetes and heart failure.
Symbicort Budesonide/Formoterol AstraZeneca Used for asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
Crestor Rosuvastatin AstraZeneca Lowers high cholesterol and triglyceride levels.
Enbrel Etanercept Amgen Treats rheumatoid arthritis, psoriatic arthritis, and plaque psoriasis.
Prolia Denosumab Amgen Used for osteoporosis in postmenopausal women and men at high risk of fracture.
Otezla Apremilast Amgen Treats plaque psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis.
Repatha Evolocumab Amgen Lowers LDL cholesterol levels.
Neulasta Pegfilgrastim Amgen Helps reduce the risk of infection in cancer patients undergoing chemotherapy.
Biktarvy Bictegravir, Emtricitabine, Tenofovir Alafenamide Gilead Treats HIV-1 infection.
Truvada Emtricitabine, Tenofovir Disoproxil Fumarate Gilead Used for HIV-1 prevention and treatment.
Veklury Remdesivir Gilead Treats COVID-19 in hospitalized patients.
Descovy Emtricitabine, Tenofovir Alafenamide Gilead HIV-1 pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) and treatment.
Epclusa Sofosbuvir, Velpatasvir Gilead Treats chronic hepatitis C virus (HCV) infection.
Eylea Aflibercept Bayer and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Treats age-related macular degeneration and other eye conditions.
Mirena Levonorgestrel-releasing intrauterine system Bayer Birth control and treatment of heavy menstrual bleeding.
Nexavar Sorafenib Bayer Treats liver, kidney, and thyroid cancer.
Kogenate Recombinant Factor VIII Bayer Treats hemophilia A.
Copaxone Glatiramer Acetate Teva Treats multiple sclerosis.
Ajovy Fremanezumab Teva Preventive treatment of migraine.
Austedo Deutetrabenazine Teva Treats chorea associated with Huntington’s disease and tardive dyskinesia.
ProAir Albuterol Sulfate Teva Treats or prevents bronchospasm.
Qvar Beclomethasone Dipropionate Teva Treats asthma.
Entyvio Vedolizumab Takeda Treats ulcerative colitis and Crohn’s disease.
Ninlaro Ixazomib Takeda Treats multiple myeloma.
Vyvanse Lisdexamfetamine Takeda Treats ADHD and binge eating disorder.
Dexilant Dexlansoprazole Takeda Treats gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).
Trintellix Vortioxetine Takeda Treats major depressive disorder.
Trulicity Dulaglutide Eli Lilly Treats Type 2 diabetes.
Humalog Insulin lispro Eli Lilly Rapid-acting insulin for diabetes.
Alimta Pemetrexed Eli Lilly Treats non-small cell lung cancer and mesothelioma.
Taltz Ixekizumab Eli Lilly Treats plaque psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis.
Verzenio Abemaciclib Eli Lilly Treats HR-positive, HER2-negative breast cancer.
Spiriva Tiotropium bromide Boehringer Ingelheim Treats COPD and asthma.
Jardiance Empagliflozin Boehringer Ingelheim Treats Type 2 diabetes and heart failure.
Pradaxa Dabigatran Boehringer Ingelheim Prevents blood clots and strokes.
Ofev Nintedanib Boehringer Ingelheim Treats idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
Trajenta Linagliptin Boehringer Ingelheim Treats Type 2 diabetes.
Tecfidera Dimethyl fumarate Biogen Treats multiple sclerosis.
Spinraza Nusinersen Biogen Treats spinal muscular atrophy.
Tysabri Natalizumab Biogen Treats multiple sclerosis and Crohn’s disease.
Vumerity Diroximel fumarate Biogen Treats multiple sclerosis.
Avonex Interferon beta-1a Biogen Treats multiple sclerosis.
Victoza Liraglutide Novo Nordisk Treats Type 2 diabetes.
Levemir Insulin detemir Novo Nordisk Long-acting insulin for diabetes.
Ozempic Semaglutide Novo Nordisk Treats Type 2 diabetes.
Tresiba Insulin degludec Novo Nordisk Long-acting insulin for diabetes.
Saxenda Liraglutide Novo Nordisk Weight management.
Botox Botulinum toxin Allergan Treats wrinkles, muscle spasms, and certain medical conditions.
Restasis Cyclosporine Allergan Increases tear production in dry eye disease.
Juvederm Hyaluronic acid Allergan Dermal filler for facial wrinkles.
Linzess Linaclotide Allergan Treats irritable bowel syndrome with constipation.
Vraylar Cariprazine Allergan Treats schizophrenia and bipolar disorder.
Lixiana Edoxaban Daiichi Sankyo Prevents blood clots and stroke.
Movantik Naloxegol Daiichi Sankyo Treats opioid-induced constipation.
Welchol Colesevelam Daiichi Sankyo Lowers cholesterol and improves glycemic control.
Sevikar Olmesartan medoxomil/Amlodipine Daiichi Sankyo Treats high blood pressure.
Nexium Esomeprazole Daiichi Sankyo Treats gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).
Eylea Aflibercept Regeneron Treats age-related macular degeneration and other eye conditions.
Dupixent Dupilumab Regeneron Treats eczema, asthma, and chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyposis.
Libtayo Cemiplimab Regeneron Treats cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma.
Kevzara Sarilumab Regeneron Treats rheumatoid arthritis.
Praluent Alirocumab Regeneron Lowers LDL cholesterol.
Xtandi Enzalutamide Astellas Treats prostate cancer.
Prograf Tacrolimus Astellas Prevents organ transplant rejection.
Vesicare Solifenacin Astellas Treats overactive bladder.
Myrbetriq Mirabegron Astellas Treats overactive bladder.
Xospata Gilteritinib Astellas Treats acute myeloid leukemia.
Abilify Aripiprazole Otsuka Treats schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, and major depressive disorder.
Rexulti Brexpiprazole Otsuka Treats schizophrenia and adjunctive therapy for major depressive disorder.
Samsca Tolvaptan Otsuka Treats hyponatremia.
Jinarc Tolvaptan Otsuka Treats polycystic kidney disease.
Abilify Maintena Aripiprazole Otsuka Long-acting injectable for schizophrenia.
Tecentriq Atezolizumab Genentech (a subsidiary of Roche) Used for treating urothelial carcinoma, non-small cell lung cancer, triple-negative breast cancer, and more.
Breyanzi Lisocabtagene Maraleucel BMS Treats relapsed or refractory large B-cell lymphoma, including diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, after two or more lines of systemic therapy.
Abecma Idecabtagene Vicleucel BMS and bluebird bio Treats relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma in adults who have received at least four prior therapies, including an immunomodulatory agent, a proteasome inhibitor, and an anti-CD38 monoclonal antibody.
Tecvayli Teclistamab Janssen Pharmaceuticals (Johnson & Johnson) Treats adult patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.
Carvykti Ciltacabtagene Autoleucel Janssen Pharmaceuticals (Johnson & Johnson) Approved for the treatment of adult patients with relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma.
No matching items
    Regulatory
    Venclexta
